module.name: callout
module.description: A highlighted box for emphasising a slide's key content — introductions, conclusions, takeaways or notes. Configurable visual style (outline / left-bar / filled / solid), optional title with an icon, and colour, border, radius, alignment and shadow controls. Replaces the old introduction / conclusion modules.

param.name: title
param.label: Title
param.desc: Optional heading shown above the body. Leave blank for none.

param.name: icon
param.label: Icon
param.desc: Optional emoji/character before the title, e.g. 💡 ✅ 📌 ⚠️.

param.name: textcolor
param.label: Body text color
param.desc: Optional. Defaults to the theme text color (white for the Solid style).

param.name: background
param.label: Background
param.desc: Optional. Overrides the style's default background.

snippet.label: Callout — Introduction
snippet.text: <!-- @callout variant: outline, title: Introduction, icon: 💡 --> Write your introduction here <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: An outlined box highlighting the slide's introduction.

snippet.label: Callout — Conclusion
snippet.text: <!-- @callout variant: outline, title: Conclusion, icon: ✅, align: center --> Write your conclusion here <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: An outlined, centred box highlighting the slide's conclusion or key points.

snippet.label: Callout — Note (left bar)
snippet.text: <!-- @callout variant: bar, title: Note, icon: 📌, color: #0ea5e9 --> Write your note here <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: A left-bar note box. variant: outline | bar | filled | solid.
